title: CONCERTO and CHAMBER: Contact-rich Coordination with Opaque, Heterogeneous Teammates
description: CONCERTO is a safety stack and training loop for physically-coupled ad-hoc cooperation with black-box partners; CHAMBER is the accompanying benchmark (CHAMBER-Bench v1.0: admitted tasks, versioned partner zoo, verifiable result bundles, per-task leaderboard). This deposit archives the software release; the data artifacts (partner sets, leaderboard bundles, reference/probe trajectories) are hosted with Croissant metadata and mirrored to Zenodo per release.
